title: Rebuilds religious iconography including Nebuchadnezzar II 4 beasts of Daniel how they both relate to Eva20s 4Adams
display_title: Rebuilds religious iconography including Nebuchadnezzar II 4 beasts of Daniel how they both relate to Eva20s 4Adams
wikitext:
[]: Rebuilds religious iconography; including Nebuchadnezzar-II, 4-beasts of Daniel, how they both relate to Eva2.0's 4Adams             Quote Post by Velorex » Sun Jul 28, 2019 10:36 am Abstract Anno based the 2nd impact including (Nebuchadnezzar and the 4 Adams) around the most famous Apocalypse prediction in the Bible's old testament. Daniel 2 and 7; King Nebuchadnezzar and the 4-beasts of the apocalypse prophecy dreams. This thread will go into detail about the two chapters and then point out other religious iconography seen in the Rebuild films. This is a "condensed" tldr version of this thread in chronological order. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Rebuilds religious iconography; involving Nebuchadnezzar-II, 4-beasts of Daniel, how they both relate to Eva2.0's 4A             Quote Post by Velorex » Sun Jul 28, 2019 1:36 pm The Book of Daniel -Bible: King James version Ch1-6 SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Rebuilds religious iconography; involving Nebuchadnezzar-II, 4-beasts of Daniel, how they both relate to Eva2.0's 4A             Quote Post by Velorex » Sun Jul 28, 2019 1:38 pm The Book of Daniel -Bible: King James version Ch 7-12 SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Rebuilds religious iconography; involving Nebuchadnezzar-II, 4-beasts of Daniel, how they both relate to Eva2.0's 4A             Quote Post by Velorex » Sun Jul 28, 2019 11:02 pm Speculations I personally dont subscribe to the theory of Eva01-06-13 all being adams. Based on Daniel 7: 7:12 As concertizing the rest of the beasts, they had their dominion taken away: yet their lives were prolonged for a season and time. Then all 3 remaining Adams would have to still be around after the 13th Angel (last horn of 4th beast) is destroyed... And Eva 06 was destroyed by the 12th angel in 3.0. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Rebuilds religious iconography; involving Nebuchadnezzar-II, 4-beasts of Daniel, how they both relate to Eva2.0's 4A             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 29, 2019 1:04 pm Thanks for bringing up these connections! Within my framework, the first three beasts would be Luvah, Urizen, and Tharmas, who all survive Second Impact. The fourth beast would be Urthona, our NGE!Adam analogue, who is destroyed in Second Impact. The 10+1 horns fit Angels 3~12 plus Kaworu suspiciously well. If these allusions are intentional on some level, then this suggests that the Angels originate specifically from Urthona. (The implied link between Lilith and the Angels can be reconciled, I suppose, by Lilith being the impetus behind Second Impact in the first place, in addition to the possibility that the Angels had once been Lilin, i.e. Lilith's offspring.)

[]: Re: Rebuilds religious iconography; involving Nebuchadnezzar-II, 4-beasts of Daniel, how they both relate to Eva2.0's 4A             Quote Post by Velorex » Mon Jul 29, 2019 1:22 pm Reichu wrote: Thanks for bringing up these connections! Within my framework, the first three beasts would be Luvah, Urizen, and Tharmas, who all survive Second Impact. The fourth beast would be Urthona, our NGE!Adam analogue, who is destroyed in Second Impact. The 10+1 horns fit Angels 3~12 plus Kaworu suspiciously well. If these allusions are intentional on some level, then this suggests that the Angels originate specifically from Urthona. (The implied link between Lilith and the Angels can be reconciled, I suppose, by Lilith being the impetus behind Second Impact in the first place, in addition to the possibility that the Angels had once been Lilin, i.e. Lilith's offspring.)

[]: Re: Rebuilds religious iconography; involving Nebuchadnezzar-II, 4-beasts of Daniel, how they both relate to Eva2.0's 4A             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jul 30, 2019 2:09 am Velorex wrote: The comparisons of Neb and Kaworu just dont work and the theory completely misses the religious iconography around Nebuchadnezzar and no mention of Daniel at all.

[]: Re: Rebuilds religious iconography; involving Nebuchadnezzar-II, 4-beasts of Daniel, how they both relate to Eva2.0's 4A             Quote Post by Velorex » Tue Jul 30, 2019 8:40 am Reichu wrote: As I've told you elsewhere, incorporating the additional information about Neb would be a matter of minimal difficulty. Nothing you've provided negates anything in my framework. It can all be worked in, unless there is a monkey wrench you haven't been able to make incredibly obvious...

[]: Re: Rebuilds religious iconography; involving Nebuchadnezzar-II, 4-beasts of Daniel, how they both relate to Eva2.0's 4A             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Jul 30, 2019 11:21 am Kinda off topic, but wasn't the red text limited to mod use only? In every one of these posts I expect them to be an edit made by a mod, but nothing. Kinda weirds me out every time I see it

[]: Re: Rebuilds religious iconography; involving Nebuchadnezzar-II, 4-beasts of Daniel, how they both relate to Eva2.0's 4A             Quote Post by Jibe » Tue Jul 30, 2019 11:34 am Great analysis angle. Just please dont fight, you two are far higher scale than this. I really enjoyed reading both. That's very constructive and mass of research. Thanks

[]: Re: Rebuilds religious iconography; involving Nebuchadnezzar-II, 4-beasts of Daniel, how they both relate to Eva2.0's 4A             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Jul 30, 2019 2:38 pm Rules wrote: Boldred and boldgreen text is reserved for official staff use (and red only for something serious).

[]: Re: Rebuilds religious iconography; involving Nebuchadnezzar-II, 4-beasts of Daniel, how they both relate to Eva2.0's 4A             Quote Post by Velorex » Sun Aug 11, 2019 5:31 pm Evangelion is a Jewish-based story more so than Christian one, lets look into the origins of the word Golgotha. In Rebuild 2.0 the DMYSYS was built in Golgotha Base Golgotha is a location described in the Bible as the location of Jesus's crucifixion. It's also associated with the term "Skull" The term Golgotha has an enormous array of derivations The feminine noun גלגלת (gulgoleth) is the Hebrew word for Skull or Head. However the term "skull" does not have the same connotation as its modern association of death and danger; such symbolism is not Biblical. The head was not associated with intellect or where the soul resides, it was just the most expressive part of the body. (The part of a person that engaged others and the world around him) The verb גלל (galal I) is all about rolling; it means to roll some object on, upon or away. This verb's enormous array of derivations: In a figurative sense it is used in ideas like to whirl or dazzle and even to roll oneself onto the Lord, meaning to put one's trust in him. References =========================================================================================================================== http://www.abarim-publications.com/Mean ... gotha.html http://www.abarim-publications.com/Dict ... g-l-l.html

[]: Re: Rebuilds religious iconography; involving Nebuchadnezzar-II, 4-beasts of Daniel, how they both relate to Eva2.0's 4A             Quote Post by Velorex » Mon Aug 19, 2019 1:17 pm The Kabbalah is a reoccurring symbol seen both in NGE and Every Rebuild film. The definition of Kabbalah varies according to the tradition and aims of those following it. =========================================================================================================================== ===========================================================================================================================

[]: Re: Rebuilds religious iconography; including Nebuchadnezzar-II, 4-beasts of Daniel, how they both relate to Eva2.0's 4A             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Aug 19, 2019 7:53 pm I've got nothing on that catch. Hats off to both Anno for including such a ridiculously tiny detail, and especially to you for spotting it and making sense of it
